heading: Tuesday Night
text: Scattered to numerous showers and storms, mainly north; storms could be severe.

heading: Wednesday
text: Chance of an early shower, then chance late in the north.

heading: Thursday
text: Rising chance of afternoon showers and storms north.
temperature: Upper 70s to upper 80s, north to south

heading: Friday
temperature: Upper 60s to mid 70s north, upper 70s to mid 80s south
